openFindings.title: retentionPolicy ephemeral does not trigger governed-ingest enforcement
openFindings.impact: Ephemeral retention can be accepted and persisted without required tenant/session/provenance metadata, contrary to the local governance contract.
openFindings.remediation: Treat any provided retentionPolicy as governed ingest, and require explicit future deleteAfter plus governed scope/provenance for ephemeral rows unless the contract is deliberately changed.

claimAdjudication.alternateExplanation: Ephemeral retention may have been intended as safe-by-default because it expires.
claimAdjudication.reason: The same file documents retention fields as governed-ingest triggers, and the save path persists the normalized decision.

openFindings.title: bulk scan and async ingest accept governance fields but drop them before indexing
openFindings.impact: Bulk indexed rows can miss tenant/user/agent/session/provenance/retention metadata even though callers supplied accepted governance parameters.
openFindings.remediation: Carry normalized governance metadata into indexMemoryFile for scan, and persist it on async ingest jobs so the worker can apply it per file.

claimAdjudication.alternateExplanation: The governance validation might be intended as preflight-only on bulk paths.
claimAdjudication.reason: The accepted schemas, handler argument types, and direct save implementation establish an expected persistence contract that scan and async ingest do not fulfill.

openFindings.title: session bootstrap playbook documents removed input and includeGraphStatus parameters
openFindings.impact: The documented manual call shape is rejected by strict schema validation.
openFindings.remediation: Update the playbook command to the live specFolder-only input contract.

openFindings.title: session resume playbook expects codeGraph.available and binaryPath fields not returned by the handler
openFindings.impact: A correct live session_resume payload can fail the documented manual validation.
openFindings.remediation: Align the playbook to status/count fields or add available and binaryPath to the handler contract.

traceabilityNotes.checklist_evidence: Target packet has no checklist.md; protocol completed as not applicable.
traceabilityNotes.feature_catalog_code: Feature catalog references were searched; stale session-resume expectations were found in the manual playbook rather than feature catalog.
traceabilityNotes.playbook_capability: Manual playbook drift recorded as F003 and F004.
